pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project configuration must reflect the target JDK version for compilation and runtime compatibility.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is not a serial component and must be annotated with @Serial since Java 14.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class required for the annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security annotation with its modern replacement.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; using it causes compilation errors or runtime warnings depending on the exact Spring Boot version, but primarily it is a breaking API change in the migration to Spring Boot 3.3 (which uses Spring Security 6.2+).

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from the deprecated fluent API (using .and()) to the new lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The .and() method and the old fluent API for configuring HttpSecurity are deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Update the HttpSecurity.apply() call to use the new HttpSecurity.with() method with a Customizer argument.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The apply() method is deprecated/removed in favor of with() in modern Spring Security, leading to compilation failures.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Migrate exceptionHandling and sessionManagement configuration blocks to the new lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The old fluent API for these sub-configurations is deprecated/removed, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Add static import for Customizer.withDefaults() to support the new Spring Security DSL syntax.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is required by the new DSL syntax for cors() and with() calls; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is a serial component and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ if the class implements Serializable.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Compilation failure: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ unless the module is configured to allow legacy serialization.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Compilation failure: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: The method List.getFirst() does not exist in Java 17, causing a compilation error.
